label: p10_r0_wave1_head_rocprof_launch_census_before_p10_x1
profiled_code_equivalence: No runtime/kernel code changed since Wave-1 B6; docs-only commit c30ec59 was HEAD during profiling. Summary classifier was then fixed to understand P10 T16 WMMA names before generating this artifact.
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (W7900 rerun unverified)
correctness_status: blocked on P10.X1; profile is diagnostic only

raw_traces_not_committed.note: Raw rocprof CSVs are local artifacts and intentionally not committed.

commands.prefill_512x0: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-p10-r0-512x0-prof --output-file p10_r0_512x0 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p10_r0_512x0_bench.json
commands.decode_512x128: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-p10-r0-512x128-prof --output-file p10_r0_512x128 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p10_r0_512x128_bench.json

profiled_wall_observation.note: Wall throughput under rocprof is lower than unprofiled B6 because the profiler adds overhead. Kernel durations and launch counts are the useful R0 data.

wall_minus_kernel_residue.interpretation: Decode has ~627 dispatches/token. Even using unprofiled B6 wall time and profiled kernel time, hidden residue is ~1.9 ms/token, making HIP graph capture/replay worth measuring after P10.X1. Prefill kernel time is already ~97% of unprofiled wall, so prefill gains must mostly come from shrinking the top kernels.

immediate_implications: P10.X1 remains first because correctness blocks retention.
Prefill top buckets after Wave 1 are Q8T16 WMMA 59.1 ms, GDN recurrent 50.4 ms, full-attention prefill 41.0 ms, Q4T16 WMMA 36.9 ms, Q5T16 WMMA 25.9 ms, router 15.3 ms.
No giant rows>1 T16 GEMV fallback remains in prefill; residual T16 GEMV buckets are small (~8.3 ms combined) and likely singleton/final-logit surfaces.
Decode top buckets are Q8T16 GEMV 231.2 ms, other 164.5 ms, Q4T16 selected dual 132.0 ms, full attention 104.6 ms, Q5T16 selected down 97.9 ms, lm-head Q6T16 72.9 ms.
Decode launch census is large enough (~627 dispatches/token) to justify P10.D6 HIP graph capture after X1, but kernel buckets are also large enough that P10.D7 bandwidth polish remains necessary.
